title: Prefix inventory
description: The lightweight, all-in-one prefix management solution for your Minecraft server.
body:
**Prefix inventory**

The lightweight, all-in-one prefix management solution for your Minecraft server.

Prefix inventory is a robust utility designed to give server administrators full control over player prefixes. Whether you want to reward players with custom titles or manage a complex hierarchy, Prefix inventory provides the tools you need through a clean GUI and a comprehensive command system.

**Key Features:**

    Intuitive GUI: Manage prefixes through an easy-to-use graphical interface.

    PlaceholderAPI Support: Includes a built-in PrefixExpansion to seamlessly display prefixes in your tab list, scoreboard, or chat.
    
    Administrative Control: Full suite of admin commands to set, remove, or modify prefixes for any player.
    
    Moderation Ready: Includes "Ban" and "Pardon" functionality specifically for prefixes, allowing you to restrict specific users from using the prefix system.
    
    Event Listeners: Optimized ChatListener and ConnectionListener to ensure prefixes load instantly when a player joins and display correctly in chat.

 **Advanced Visuals & Formatting**

Give your chat a modern look! Prefix inventory supports full color customization, allowing players and admins to express themselves without limits:
    Standard Colors: Support for all legacy color codes (e.g., Red, Blue, Gold).
    RGB & Hex Support: Use any color imaginable (e.g., &#FF5555) to match specific aesthetics.
    Gradients: Create stunning text that blends smoothly between multiple colors.
    Rainbow Text: Automatically animate or colorize prefixes with a full spectrum rainbow effect.

 **Commands**
 
Manage everything directly from the chat or console using these streamlined commands:
    /prinv – Opens the main GUI for players to select their prefixes.
    /prset <player> <prefix> – Manually set a specific prefix for a player.
    /prrm <player> – Remove a player's current prefix and reset it to default.
    /pradd <prefix> – Admin command to add new valid prefixes to the system/inventory.
    /prban <player> – Ban a player from changing or using prefixes.
    /prpardon <player> – Unban a player, restoring their access to the prefix system.
